name: Haruta
description:
__Affiliations:__ Whitebeard Pirates

Haruta is the commander of the 12th division of the Whitebeard Pirates. He wears a green and white 16th century-style ruffed outfit with white tights and carries a saber whose hand guard resembles the ruffles of his shirt.

For several years, Haruta's gender was unknown to fans. In the anime, Haruta has a female voice actor. However, in an SBS Oda stated that no female members of the Whitebeard Pirates were at the battle of Marineford.
